race_meta.race_name: Midnite, Building The Future Of Betting Handicap (Class 5)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked st faz at position 5 with only 8.0% probability. Top pick was Knight Of Magic (30.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Knight Of Magic > Swinging London, but actual result was St Faz > Dollar's Dream. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner St Faz showed negative divergence (-15.1%): Model overvalued at 8.0% vs Market 23.1%. Market sentiment more accurate than model.
